objective: Animate Status Bar During Conflict Resolution
tests_added: conflict resolved with keep_local publishes the backing-up animation
conflict resolved with restore_backup publishes the restoring animation
design_decisions: Published the 'backing_up' or 'restoring' AutoSyncStatusKind immediately before `resolveGameStartConflictCall` in the conflict resolution branch.
Did not modify any UI surface, reused existing animation capabilities.
results: All tests pass, including the two new tests. Quality gates verified.
